sizing_rule.note: Increase position size by 25% above base after 3+ consecutive winning trades, subject to drawdown constraint (≤20% from peak) and cumulative equity gain constraint (≥10% gain threshold). Primary anti-martingale scaling with secondary drawdown-based guardrails.

source_rule_text: Increase position size during winning streaks and after profitable trades, but within defined limits, to capitalize on momentum while managing drawdown recovery risk.
